description: This file implements core authentication functions including registration, login, MFA verification, token refresh, and logout for a Spring Boot application. It manages user credentials, MFA challenges, JWT token issuance, and refresh token handling.

classes.name: AuthService
classes.description: Service class providing authentication functionalities such as registration, login, MFA verification, token refresh and logout.

methods.name: registerApplicant
methods.description: Registers a new app user with email and password, assigns the applicant role, enables MFA, and saves to repository.

methods.name: loginStep1
methods.description: Validates user credentials; if MFA is enabled, creates MFA challenge and returns pending status.

methods.name: loginStep2VerifyMfa
methods.description: Verifies MFA OTP and issues authentication tokens.

methods.name: issueTokens
methods.description: Generates access and refresh tokens for a user, stores the hashed refresh token.

methods.name: refresh
methods.description: Validates and revokes old refresh token, then issues new tokens.

methods.name: logout
methods.description: Revokes the provided refresh token, effectively logging out the user.
